Class ErrorHandler

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.util.ErrorHandler
public class ErrorHandler extends Object
Shared JavaFX alerts and short user-safe messages for HTTP SQL and validation failures.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ErrorHandler()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    friendlyDbMessage(SQLException ex)
    Maps SQL failures into user-safe guidance for common database cases.
    static void
    handleException(String context, Exception e)
    Logs an exception and shows a user-safe error alert.
    static void
    showErrorDialog(String title, String message)
    Displays a basic error alert with sanitized message text.
    static void
    showErrorDialog(String title, String header, String content)
    Displays an error alert with header and sanitized detail text.
    static void
    showErrorDialog(String title, String header, Throwable cause)
    Builds user-facing detail from exception causes and common HTTP or SQL failures.
    static void
    showInfo(String title, String message)
    Displays an informational alert for non-error confirmations.
    static void
    showValidationErrors(List<String> errors)
    Displays validation errors as a numbered warning list.
    static void
    showWarning(String title, String message)
    Displays a warning alert with plain message text.
    static String
    userFacingMessage(Throwable t)
    Returns short safe detail text for inline UI and custom dialogs.

      Builds user-facing detail from exception causes and common HTTP or SQL failures.

      Returns short safe detail text for inline UI and custom dialogs.

      Logs an exception and shows a user-safe error alert.
